title: helenium oppositifolium
intro: Helenium oppositifolium, also known as opposite-leaved sneezeweed, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving congestion, and soothing digestive issues. Helenium oppositifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory problems.
